name: Chocolate Fudge Icing (for Plain Cake)
recipeInstructions:
Re: Chocolate Fudge Icing
This icing recipe is a candy recipe with milk added to make it into frosting.
1. Bring to a boil in a large heavy pan.
2. Cook covered for 2-3 minutes until the steam washes down any crystals that may have formed from the sides of the pan.
3. Uncover, reduce heat, and cook without stirring to soft-ball stage (238°F).
4. Remove from heat without jostling or stirring. Allow the candy to cool to 110°F. You can speed up this process by placing the hot pan in a larger pan of cold water until the bottom of the pan has cooled.
5. Add 2 tablespoons butter and beat until partially melted.
6. Add 1 teaspoon vanilla extract and continue beating until the mixture begins to lose its sheen. The drip from the spoon, when flipped over, should hold its shape against the bottom of the spoon.
7. Quickly add 1/2 to 1 cup broken nut meats (optional).
8. Pour the fudge into a buttered pan and cut into squares before it hardens.
9. To use for centers, beat until thick, knead, and shape.
10. For chocolate fudge icing, mix in 1 cup of milk until the icing reaches the desired consistency to be spread.
